name: Necmttn/ax
summary: Local agent-experience graph for Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, Cursor, and Pi sessions, turning tool calls, skills, costs, routing, hooks, and telemetry into CLI, dashboard, and MCP query surfaces.
evidence: Ingests Codex sessions from `~/.codex/sessions/` alongside other coding-agent harness transcripts.
Exposes Codex session, tool-call, cost, routing, and skill usage through CLI, dashboard, and read-only MCP query surfaces.
